message.content:
I can help, but I don’t have live weather data right now. Please tell me:
- Your location (city or ZIP code)
- What you want (current conditions, hourly forecast for today, 7-day outlook, or weather alerts)

If you’d prefer, I can also describe typical weather for your area for this time of year once you provide the location. You can also check via your phone’s weather app or a web weather service.
